task: Build ClawChain block explorer (clawinfra/claw-chain repo, issue #34). Create services/explorer/ as Next.js 14 App Router app with TypeScript strict + Tailwind. Pages: /blocks (live block list — hash, timestamp, tx count, producer, auto-updates via WS), /blocks/[hash] (block detail), /tx/[hash] (type/sender/status/events decoded), /agents/[address] (DID from pallet-agent-registry, reputation from pallet-reputation, quota from pallet-gas-quota). Components: BlockList with api.rpc.chain.subscribeNewHeads() live feed, TxDetail, AgentProfile, LiveIndicator (WS status). lib/api.ts: @polkadot/api singleton (default wss://testnet.clawchain.win via NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL env). Dark theme #0a0a0a bg / #00D4FF accent, header shows live block #. Handle loading states + WS disconnects gracefully. Dockerfile, .env.example, README with deploy to explorer.clawchain.win. Clone to /tmp/claw-chain-explorer, branch feat/block-explorer, PR linking #34, gh CLI (AlexChen31337).
